privacy.notes: This contract bundle contains synthetic fixtures only.

commands.name: diff-year
commands.notes: Compare two pricing years and report changes in formulae, parameters, coding-set versions, source artifacts, and validation status.

comparison_dimensions.label: Formulae
comparison_dimensions.description: Detect changes in pricing formulas, constants, and derived coefficients.

comparison_dimensions.label: Parameters
comparison_dimensions.description: Compare adjustment parameters and other configured inputs that affect results.

comparison_dimensions.label: Coding sets
comparison_dimensions.description: Surface version changes in classification or coding-set references.

comparison_dimensions.label: Source artifacts
comparison_dimensions.description: Summarize added, removed, or revised source files and supporting manifests.

comparison_dimensions.label: Validation status
comparison_dimensions.description: Report whether the compared years remain validated, newly validated, or no longer validated.

examples.name: diff-year-markdown
examples.description: Synthetic markdown diff report showing a concise year-to-year change summary.

examples.name: diff-year-json
examples.description: Synthetic JSON diff report showing the same comparison in machine-readable form.
